---
title: "Etabli Focus"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-focus.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Offline tool</span>

> Track focus sessions by category.

Etabli Focus is a Pomodoro and focus-session tracker. Work blocks are recorded by category (deep work, review, admin, research, manuscript, data analysis) with configurable focus and break durations and local notifications. Timers survive force-quit and reboot. Fully offline.

![Focus — today view with categories and history.](../_screens/android-today.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Anyone wanting to record focused work cleanly across multiple sessions — for self-tracking, for invoicing, or as a data backbone for a more deliberate work setup.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. The app runs fully offline; sessions and categories live only on the device.

## Installation

| Platform | Source |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | App Store |
| Android  | Google Play and F-Droid (main repository) |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
